meaning: adj.刻板的,十足的,赤裸的,荒凉的adv.完全地
examples: Stark took two whiskeys from a tray.
Social divisions in the city are stark.
She seemed to have gone stark raving mad.
And as a last resort, NYPD would raise prices of some menu items, Mr. Stark says.
The report paints a stark picture of a reluctant agency way in over its head.
